home.aciklama: From React to Spring Boot, from C to PostgreSQL — a developer producing full-stack solutions. Building software that makes a difference.

about.bio1: I've been actively developing software for 2 years. I've built projects in many fields, from web to mobile, from IoT to AI-powered applications.
about.bio2: I previously developed and sold a web application called SkyBook. I developed mobile applications using Android Studio and Java. I actively integrate AI into my research and development processes.
about.bio3: I want to specialize in backend development. I'm also actively improving myself in computer networks and project management.
about.exp1_aciklama: Successfully sold SkyBook, a web application I built from scratch. Designed and launched it as a fullstack project from the ground up.
about.exp2_aciklama: Developed mobile applications using Android Studio and Java. Learned native Android development processes.
about.exp3_aciklama: Built applications combining hardware and software using IoT Stack.
about.exp4_aciklama: Graduated from Computer Engineering. Currently improving myself in backend development, computer networks, and project management.

projects.aciklama: Projects I've designed and built from scratch. Each one was written to solve a different problem.
projects.skybook_aciklama: A fullstack web application I designed and built from scratch, then successfully sold. Includes user management, reservation system, and payment integration.

contact.aciklama: Have an idea? Want to work together? Leave a message below, I'll get back to you within 24 hours.
contact.basari_aciklama: I'll get back to you as soon as possible.
